label: CS0117: Member not found -- check KG for correct Unity 6.3 API name; often caused by renamed methods
CS0619: Obsolete member used -- KG lookup for replacement API; check unity63_breaking entries
CS0246: Type or namespace not found -- check unity63_breaking for removed namespaces (Experimental.*)
CS0103: Name not in scope -- add missing using directive; check UnityEngine.SceneManagement, UnityEngine.InputSystem
CS0029: Cannot implicitly convert type -- use explicit Unity type casts; e.g., (RigidbodyConstraints) or as T
CS1061: Member not defined on type -- API may have been renamed in Unity 6.x; query KG for correct method
CS0428: Cannot convert method group -- Unity callback pattern requires void return and correct parameter signature
CS0234: Namespace member missing -- UnityEngine.Experimental.* removed in 6.3; check non-Experimental equivalents
CS0120: Object reference required for non-static field -- Unity 6.3 changed some helpers to instance methods
CS0535: Interface not implemented -- Unity 6.x updated IJobEntity and ISystem interfaces; implement new required methods
CS0115: Method marked override but no base method found -- MonoBehaviour callback signature may have changed in 6.3
CS7036: Required formal parameter missing -- method signature changed; check unity63_breaking for updated APIs
